mainEntity.name: How long does GST registration take in Mumbai?

acceptedAnswer.text: 3-7 working days from application submission, subject to Aadhaar authentication and document verification. If the officer requests additional information or site visit, it may take up to 15 days. We follow up proactively.

mainEntity.name: What documents are needed for GST registration in Mumbai?

acceptedAnswer.text: PAN card, Aadhaar of proprietor/partners/directors, photograph, proof of Mumbai business address (rent agreement + NOC from landlord, or ownership proof + electricity bill), bank statement or cancelled cheque, and Certificate of Incorporation/Partnership Deed (for entities).

mainEntity.name: Is GST registration mandatory if my business is in Mumbai?

acceptedAnswer.text: GST registration is mandatory if your aggregate turnover exceeds Rs 40 lakhs (goods) or Rs 20 lakhs (services). However, e-commerce sellers, inter-state suppliers, and persons making taxable supply on behalf of others must register regardless of turnover under Section 24 of CGST Act.
